ds-equipmentfacts.notes: Sandhills Cloud platform — ADESA Mercer (NJ auto auction) + Indiana Auto Auction + truck auctions. ADESA lots flagged as source_type=equipmentfacts_adesa. Schedule: every 3hr.

ds-usgovbid.notes: USGovBid (usgovbid.com) impound/surplus vehicle auctions. WordPress Events Calendar REST API + Maxanet platform (bid.usgovbid.com). Playwright required for AJAX lot loading.

ds-jjkane.notes: JJ Kane Government Surplus (jjkane.com) — Algolia-based (no Playwright). Covers FL, NV, CA, TX, AZ and 20+ non-rust-belt states. Nevada State Surplus routes through JJ Kane. Est. ~600-800 vehicles/run (FL ~420 alone).

ds-hibid-v2.notes: HiBid GraphQL API (pure fetch, no Playwright). Replaces lexis-solutions rented actor. Category 700006 = Cars & Vehicles. US-only via countryName filter. 24 vehicle make keywords. Test run confirmed working.

ds-bidspotter.notes: BidSpotter.com — 3-level Playwright crawler (catalogue list → catalogue → lot). AWS WAF protected, uses Apify browser fingerprinting. US-only filter applied. Build 1.0.16.

ds-hibid.notes: Replaced by ds-hibid-v2 (GraphQL). Lexis-solutions rented actor — disable to eliminate rental cost.

ds-bidcal.notes: BidCal catalog lives on hibid.com — covered by ds-hibid-v2. No separate actor needed.

ds-auctiontime.notes: Imperva-blocked + primarily farm equipment (<5% passenger vehicles). Not viable.
